mapper.sql: app.id AS applicationId, app.id AS id, app.user_id AS userId, u.id AS candidateId, AS candidateName, AS email, AS phone, AS educationLevel, s.group_name AS groupName, s.id AS subsidiaryId, s.subsidiary_name AS subsidiaryName, j.business_line AS businessLine, j.id AS jobId, j.title AS jobTitle, jc.id AS jobCategoryId, jc.category_name AS categoryName, rp.code AS provinceCode, rp.name AS provinceName, rc.code AS cityCode, rc.name AS cityName, r.id AS resumeId, r.resume_name AS resumeName, r.pdf_url AS resumePdfUrl, r.education_json AS educationJson, r.skills_json AS resumeSkillsJson, r.project_json AS projectJson, r.experience_json AS experienceJson, j.required_skills_json AS requiredSkillsJson, app.stage AS stage, app.hr_note AS hrNote, app.match_score AS matchScore, app.system_match_score AS systemMatchScore, app.hr_review_score AS hrReviewScore, app.hr_review_status AS hrReviewStatus, app.hr_review_time AS hrReviewTime, app.apply_time AS applyTime, app.update_time AS updateTime

FROM application_record app INNER JOIN sys_user u ON u.id = app.user_id INNER JOIN job j ON j.id = app.job_id INNER JOIN subsidiary_company s ON s.id = j.subsidiary_id INNER JOIN job_category jc ON jc.id = j.job_category_id INNER JOIN region_province rp ON rp.code = j.province_code INNER JOIN region_city rc ON rc.code = j.city_code INNER JOIN resume r ON r.id = app.resume_id
mapper.insert: INSERT INTO application_record ( user_id, job_id, resume_id, stage, hr_note, match_score, system_match_score, hr_review_score, hr_review_status, hr_review_time, apply_time, update_time ) VALUES ( #{userId}, #{jobId}, #{resumeId}, #{stage}, #{hrNote}, #{matchScore}, #{systemMatchScore}, #{hrReviewScore}, #{hrReviewStatus}, #{hrReviewTime}, NOW(), NOW() )
mapper.select: SELECT id, user_id, job_id, resume_id, stage, hr_note, match_score, system_match_score, hr_review_score, hr_review_status, hr_review_time, apply_time, update_time FROM application_record WHERE user_id = #{userId} AND job_id = #{jobId} LIMIT 1

SELECT id, user_id, job_id, resume_id, stage, hr_note, match_score, system_match_score, hr_review_score, hr_review_status, hr_review_time, apply_time, update_time FROM application_record WHERE id = #{id} LIMIT 1
mapper.update: UPDATE application_record SET resume_id = #{resumeId}, stage = 'APPLIED', hr_note = NULL, match_score = #{matchScore}, system_match_score = #{systemMatchScore}, hr_review_score = NULL, hr_review_status = NULL, hr_review_time = NULL, apply_time = NOW(), update_time = NOW() WHERE id = #{id}
UPDATE application_record SET hr_review_score = #{hrReviewScore}, hr_review_status = #{hrReviewStatus}, hr_note = #{hrNote}, hr_review_time = NOW(), update_time = NOW() WHERE id = #{applicationId}
mapper.select: SELECT COUNT(1) FROM application_record WHERE user_id = #{userId} AND stage IN ('INTERVIEW', 'OFFER')
SELECT COUNT(1) FROM application_record WHERE DATE(apply_time) = CURRENT_DATE
SELECT stage AS stage, COUNT(1) AS value FROM application_record GROUP BY stage ORDER BY FIELD(stage, 'APPLIED', 'SCREENING', 'INTERVIEW', 'OFFER', 'REJECTED', 'WITHDRAWN')

SELECT s.id AS subsidiaryId, s.subsidiary_name AS name, COUNT(1) AS value FROM application_record app INNER JOIN job j ON j.id = app.job_id INNER JOIN subsidiary_company s ON s.id = j.subsidiary_id GROUP BY s.id, s.subsidiary_name ORDER BY value DESC, s.sort_num ASC, s.id ASC
